title: API Authentication Errors
content: Error 401: Authentication failed. This means your API key is invalid or expired. Check that you're using the correct API key and that it hasn't been revoked. You can generate a new key in your API settings.

title: API Rate Limiting
content: We enforce rate limits to ensure service stability. Free tier: 100 requests/hour. Pro tier: 1000 requests/hour. Enterprise: custom limits. If you exceed your limit, retry after a brief delay.

title: Integration Guide
content: Step-by-step guide: 1) Get your API key from dashboard. 2) Include it in request headers. 3) Make requests to our endpoints. 4) Handle responses and errors. See documentation for code examples.

title: Common Integration Issues
content: CORS errors: Check your domain whitelist. Timeout errors: Increase timeout value to 30s+. SSL errors: Use HTTPS for all requests. Encoding issues: Ensure UTF-8 encoding.
